description_long: This is a compact, vintage-style refrigerator with a boxy, rectangular form and rounded top edges. The front features two separate doors, each with a prominent, horizontally oriented metallic handle, indicating a freezer compartment above and a refrigerator compartment below. The exterior is finished in a pale, muted color, likely off-white or light gray, with subtle metallic trim outlining the doors and edges. The rear side displays an exposed condenser coil in a serpentine pattern and a rectangular vent grille at the bottom, typical of older refrigerator designs. The sides are plain and unadorned, emphasizing the utilitarian, robust construction. The overall appearance suggests a sturdy appliance suitable for placement in garages, utility rooms, or retro-themed urban environments.
description: A compact, vintage-style refrigerator with two doors, metallic handles, and an exposed rear condenser coil. The exterior is pale and boxy, with rounded edges and minimalistic detailing.
description_view_0: The left side of the refrigerator, showing a plain, smooth surface with no visible features or detailing.
description_view_1: The front view, displaying two doors with metallic handles and a subtle trim, clearly showing the freezer and refrigerator compartments.
description_view_2: The right side, similar to the left, is plain and unadorned, with the door edge and trim slightly visible.
description_view_3: The rear view, featuring a prominent serpentine condenser coil and a rectangular vent grille at the bottom.
attribute_door_handle_style: Protruding, horizontal metallic handles located on the upper section of each door, with a classic, robust design.
attribute_vent_or_grille_pattern: Rectangular vent grille with horizontal slats located at the lower rear side.
